evidence: Logan: 'Can we make like a 30 second look at the information that we capture via Careerspan? Because if that's in an email... they don't have to wrap their heads around what it is we're describing. It's just like oh shit, I want that information.'

Logan identified the core problem: 'The problem with our existing materials is that it takes a fuck ton of word space to explain what it is that we do and why it's relevant.' Then proposed the video solution.

source_display: Video Over Deck for Sales Collateral

source_display: ChatGPT Projects as Zo's ICP Signal
evidence: Zo target market identified: ChatGPT Project users hitting limits—people smart enough to use AI tools but needing persistent context and larger file capacity. David is exactly this profile.
David: 'I really don't know how systems architecture works' - wants to build ambitious AI systems but acknowledges lack of technical capability to implement.
V: 'deepwiki.com you can add any repository and it will turn it into a Wikipedia.' David immediately recognized it as way to understand N5OS without technical knowledge.

source_display: Messaging as Primary Job Seeker Pain Point
